items.claim: Poliev's improved performance in the third round against Atiba was primarily due to Atiba gassing out rather than Poliev's own skill.
items.quote: it was more so Atiba just completely worn out and gassed out, and that's why Poliev looked better as the fight went on.

items.claim: Yakayev is 9-0 professionally and 2-0 in the UFC.
items.quote: Yakayev, 9-0 in the United 9-0 professionally, 2-0 in the UFC
his striking is not that polished.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker's chin is not very good.
Better strikers who are defensively sound will be able to put Yakayev down.
items.quote: better strikers who are more defensively sound and just got better striking skills in general are going to be able to put this guy down

items.claim: Hebeto had success stinging Yakayev early in their fight.
